ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code representing the subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "sessional" TEXT /* Weighting of sessional assessments */,
  "assignments" INTEGER /* Number of assignments in the course */,
  "exam" INTEGER /* Weight of the final exam */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total possible score for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic session */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisites for the course */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Syllabus of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program of study */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year of admission */,
  "admission_session" TEXT /* Session of admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "final_grade" REAL /* Final grade for the course */,
  "audit_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is taken for audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the assignment belongs */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the assignment towards the final grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "grading_status" TEXT /* Grading status (e.g., graded, ungraded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the exam is held */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam (e.g., Midterm, Final) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the exam towards the final grade */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the exam */,
  "grading_status" TEXT /* Grading status (e.g., graded, ungraded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the grade is awarded */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment for which the grade is given */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam for which the grade is given */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade awarded to the student */,
  "grading_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was assigned */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor on the assignment/exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. faculty, student, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the faculty member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" INTEGER /* Department to which the faculty member belongs */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number of the faculty member */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of appointment */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the faculty member (e.g., Assistant Professor, Professor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "attendance_type" TEXT /* Type of attendance (e.g., lecture, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "class_day" TEXT /* Day of the week for the class */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the class */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., lecture, lab, tutorial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedule_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedule_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedule_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student giving the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* The feedback text provided by the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., out of 5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
